$comment: Source: gp-api/src/queue/queue.types.ts::AgentExperimentResultSchema (Zod). This is a hand-maintained JSON Schema projection of the Zod schema for the agent experiment result envelope forwarded by pmf_engine.callback_handler.format_gp_api_sqs_queue_message to the gp-api results queue. Update process: when queue.types.ts changes, update this file and re-run pmf_engine/tests/test_gp_api_zod_contract.py. The test_snapshot_matches_source test cross-checks the status enum against the source file so drift fails in CI.
